title: zehneria tenuispica
intro: Zehneria tenuispica, also known as the small-fruited zehneria or small-fruited snake gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is a climber or twiner native to tropical Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Zehneria tenuispica is often used to make herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
